browserAutomation.exception: Existing Naver Search Advisor tab was reused first. A Naver OAuth/Chrome extension block appeared on recheck, so the remaining Baidu check used an already-open about:blank tab; no new browser tab was created. This deviation is documented instead of silently claiming perfect one-tab compliance.
